mapper.select:
SELECT t.
industry_code concept_code AS relatedCode, n.name AS relatedName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.stock_code) AS intersectionCount, src_cnt.sourceTotal AS sourceCount FROM
stock_industry stock_concept s INNER JOIN
stock_industry stock_concept t ON s.stock_code = t.stock_code AND t.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN
industry concept n ON t.
industry_code concept_code = n.code AND n.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stock_code) AS sourceTotal FROM
stock_industry stock_concept
WHERE
industry_code concept_code = #{targetSectorCode} AND is_deleted = 0 ) src_cnt WHERE s.
industry_code concept_code = #{targetSectorCode} AND s.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.
industry_code concept_code , n.name, src_cnt.sourceTotal HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.stock_code) > 0 ORDER BY intersectionCount DESC LIMIT #{maxResults}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stock_code) FROM
stock_industry stock_concept
WHERE
industry_code concept_code = #{sectorCode} AND is_deleted = 0
